macro_events.event_summary: Copper prices hit a record high, driven by AI/data center electrification demand plus broader structural supply tightness.
primary_drivers: Higher realized copper prices flow directly to miner revenue/margin (operating leverage on fixed mining costs)
Structural demand from AI data center power buildout, grid electrification, and EVs against constrained mine supply
Input cost inflation for copper-intensive downstream manufacturers

beneficiaries.rationale: Freeport-McMoRan is the largest US-listed pure-play copper miner; ~70%+ of revenue from copper. Every $0.10/lb move in copper adds roughly $400M+ to annual EBITDA — record prices directly translate to earnings upgrades.
Southern Copper is a near-pure-play copper producer (Peru/Mexico) with among the lowest cash costs in the industry; record copper prices expand margins disproportionately given the fixed-cost base.
Teck Resources has pivoted to a copper-focused major after coal divestment; QB2 ramp gives it rising copper volume leverage into record prices.
Ero Copper is a smaller-cap pure-play Brazilian copper miner with high operating leverage; record copper directly boosts cash flow and momentum-driven re-rating in small-cap miners.
Rio Tinto's Oyu Tolgoi underground ramp is bringing on large incremental copper volumes; record prices accelerate the segment's contribution to group earnings.
Copper royalty/streaming names and explorers tend to rotate with the spot price; Cuprum/explorer peer flows lift speculative copper-leveraged names alongside the majors.

losers.rationale: Enphase microinverters and balance-of-system solar hardware are copper-intensive; sustained record copper raises BOM costs at a time when residential solar pricing power is already weak.
Generac generators and home energy products use significant copper windings; input cost inflation pressures gross margin if it can't be passed through to channel.
EVs use ~3-4x the copper of ICE vehicles; record copper raises BOM cost on already-money-losing EV programs (Model e segment for Ford), pressuring the EV transition economics.

headlines: Copper prices are now at their highest level on record. AI is only part of the story.
